title: Close increment 2-wpr
description:
## Objective
This is the final iteration of increment 2-wpr; the I&A cycle's last task closes the increment rather than handing off to a next iteration.

## Implementation
1. Verify exit criteria in `.devmeta/increments/increment-2-wpr/_overview.md` are all met (each checkbox).
2. Edit `_overview.md`: change `**Status:** NOT STARTED` (or `In Progress`) to `**Status:** DONE — 2026-MM-DD`. Mark exit-criteria checkboxes [x].
3. Update `.devmeta/current-increment.md`: move increment 2-wpr from Active to History with final status; clear or set Active to TBD (user will start the next increment via /devmeta:start-increment-spec).
4. Stage and commit on `s2-win-probability`: `git add .devmeta/increments/increment-2-wpr/_overview.md .devmeta/current-increment.md && git commit -m \"DevMeta: close increment 2-wpr (Pipeline Stage Win Probability)\" && git push`.

## Tests
Increment 2-wpr marked DONE in both files; commit pushed; tk list shows nothing ready next.
acceptance_criteria: _overview.md status=DONE, current-increment.md History updated, commit pushed
